g.title: gnd-eng
g.text: Ground HUB — engine bay / battery ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: rtmr-const
g.text: CONSTANT (battery) bus (RTMR, bussed) ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: rly-ignmain
g.text: Ignition main relay ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: tail-rl
g.text: Tail/position + brake LEFT ↗ Rear / boot module

g.title: rtmr-ign
g.text: Cabin IGNITION bus (RTMR, bussed) ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: rly-turnL
g.text: Turn-signal LEFT relay ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: rly-turnR
g.text: Turn-signal RIGHT relay ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: sw-hazard
g.text: Hazard switch (added — in the old cigar-lighter location)

g.title: snd-oil
g.text: Oil-pressure gauge sender ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: sw-oillight
g.text: Oil-pressure warning switch ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: instr-pwm
g.text: Instrument-light PWM dimmer module ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: o2-sensor
g.text: Wideband O2 sensor (future) ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)
